title: Kirby Fall Meme Scream
description: Players and villagers make a Kirby fall scream meme sound when falling to death
body:
Players make a kirby fall scream meme sound when they make a fatal fall. Just a funny addition to the game

Not an actual sound from the Kirby anime, this one is actually from "Kung fu você conhece o whatsapp" video.

Goes well with [Scream & Disappear Death Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/screamdisappear-death-sounds) :)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-G-AuLXhTN4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
